phrases.intent_en: Where are spa wafers sold nearby?
phrases.text_local: Kde v okolí prodávají lázeňské oplatky?
phrases.cultural_note: Spa wafers (lázeňské oplatky) are a traditional Czech sweet, often enjoyed warm from a street vendor.

likely_response.local: U východu k řece, hned za rohem.
likely_response.translation_en: At the exit to the river, just around the corner.

responses.english: At the exit to the river, just around the corner.
responses.local: U východu k řece, hned za rohem.

phrases.intent_en: Is the colonnade exit to Teplá river?
phrases.text_local: Vede východ z kolonády k řece Teplé?
phrases.cultural_note: A stroll along the Teplá river promenade is a classic part of the spa town experience.

likely_response.local: Ano, zadní východ vede přímo na promenádu.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the back exit leads directly to the promenade.

responses.english: Yes, the back exit leads directly to the promenade.
responses.local: Ano, zadní východ vede přímo na promenádu.

phrases.intent_en: How do I use the spring fountain?
phrases.cultural_note: The water is very hot (72°C), so be careful when filling and drinking from the small spout of the cup.

likely_response.local: Stačí naplnit pohárek přímo z pramene.
likely_response.translation_en: Just fill your cup directly from the spring.

responses.english: Just fill your cup directly from the spring.
responses.local: Stačí naplnit pohárek přímo z pramene.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy a porcelain cup?
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu koupit porcelánový pohárek?
phrases.cultural_note: Drinking spa water from a traditional porcelain cup (with a spout) is a key part of the Karlovy Vary experience.

likely_response.translation_en: To the right of the spring, at the stall.

responses.english: To the right of the spring, at the stall.

phrases.cultural_note: The Vřídlo geyser is not a timed show but a natural, continuous eruption that changes in intensity.
